name: python3-requests-futures
title: python3-requests-futures
description:
library for asynchronous HTTP requests (Python 3)
Requests-futures is a small add-on for python-requests that allows one to
create asynchronous HTTP requests.
.
This package provides the module for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-requests-futures because library for asynchronous HTTP requests (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-requests-futures as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-requests-futures with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-requests-futures --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
